scripts.dev:all: concurrently "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:ai" "pnpm run dev:session" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.deploy:api: cd apps/worker && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:ai: cd apps/worker-ai && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:session: cd apps/worker-session && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:web: cd apps/web && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --env production --config wrangler.json
scripts.deploy:all: pnpm run deploy:api && pnpm run deploy:ai && pnpm run deploy:session && pnpm run deploy:web
scripts.verify: node scripts/secret-scan.js && pnpm --filter @sovereign/worker test && pnpm run lint && pnpm --filter web build
